findings.issue: Finnhub API key hardcoded in source code as public constant.
findings.est_impact: Prevents credential exposure and allows secure key rotation.

findings.issue: buildAgent06System() called on every request, rebuilding same 800+ token system prompt repeatedly.
findings.suggestion: Cache system prompt in module scope with file watcher for skill updates.
findings.est_impact: Reduces redundant token consumption across synthesis, validate, structure, review-code endpoints.

findings.issue: loadDiscordSignals() and loadAllHistoricalSignals() parse same HISTORY_FILE with nearly identical logic.
findings.suggestion: Extract common parsing into loadHistoryFile(limit) helper, deduplicate filtering logic.
findings.est_impact: Reduces maintenance burden and file I/O overhead.

findings.issue: fetch() to market data has no timeout; slow/hanging Finnhub responses block background-cycle.
findings.suggestion: Add AbortController with 5s timeout and explicit error handling for network failures.
findings.est_impact: Prevents scheduler stalls and ensures consistent cycle execution.

findings.issue: trader-deep-dive loops through channels with hardcoded 800ms delay but no rate-limit validation.
findings.suggestion: Query Anthropic rate limits and adapt delay dynamically or queue requests.
findings.est_impact: Prevents accidental rate-limit hammering and uncontrolled token spend.

findings.issue: marketContext variable built but only interpolated once; no reuse across synthesis calls.
findings.suggestion: Consider passing as persistent context or storing in memory for multi-step analysis.
